verdict_reasoning: SRC is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase canonically myristoylated and palmitoylated on the cytoplasmic (inner) leaflet of the plasma membrane — it is inner-leaflet-anchored, not outer-leaflet-accessible under baseline conditions. However, multiple lines of evidence support cell-state-induced outer-leaflet display: SRC is a well-documented cancer ecto-kinase found on the extracellular face of tumor cells and has been targeted by surface-directed therapeutic strategies in oncology contexts. This qualifies as contextual / cell_state_induced (oncogenic transformation ecto-display).
